title: Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Chidi Kho Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in the Rajgarh district of Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Chidi Kho Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in the Rajgarh district of Madhya Pradesh, India. Established in 1978, it covers 57.197 km2 (22.084 sq mi) of dry deciduous forest on the northern edge of the Malwa Plateau.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (52 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Narsinghgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narsinghgarh, Madhya Pradesh.
